definition: in a control loop, the target value the process value is intended to assume, expressed as the percentage of the process value measuring range

definition_ml.en: in a control loop, the target value the process value is intended to assume, expressed as the percentage of the process value measuring range
definition_ml.de: in einem Regelkreis der Zielwert, den der Prozesswert annehmen soll, ausgedrückt in relativen Einheiten des Prozesswert-Messbereichs

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
remark_ml.de: auch verwendet von Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
